response.justification: Bogdan possesses a wealth of experience in high-throughput distributed systems and recent, highly relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows. While he lacks the required Python expertise, his strong TypeScript skills, Staff-level background, and adaptability across numerous languages make him a compelling candidate for this AI-driven environment.
strengths: Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure and supporting agentic workflows (MCP).
Proven track record with high-throughput, distributed microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Extensive Staff-level and technical leadership experience, including setting up DevOps infrastructure and mentoring.
concerns: No mention of Python experience, which is listed as a must-have technical skill.
Resume focuses heavily on individual technical execution rather than cross-functional stakeholder management.
Multiple overlapping concurrent roles may raise questions about focus and full operational ownership.
